description: Pinned input identities for the golden-plan suite (PL-4). Every determinism-input identity is pinned here or derived from a pinned artifact: the profile per example (null = base document), the shared identity elements below, the mock provider package (mapping version from its signed manifest), the empty state snapshot (revision 0), and the planner version from @iap/planner. profileHashes are computed by the runner as sha256 over the canonical serialization of the named profile definition in the source document.

multi-region.reason: users-db-primary declares availability: maximum on Database, which the mock mapping's honest values constraint (standard | high) deliberately rejects (ch. 12 §12.3); the example declares no profiles, so no profile pin can avoid it. The golden is the deterministic fail-closed diagnostic set instead of a plan.
